title: Household mode
subtitle: Your finances as a couple — combined totals, without sharing transactions.

settings.intro: Share a combined view of your finances with your partner. Each of you sees only the other’s TOTALS (portfolio, debt, balance) — never the transactions.
settings.inviteHint: The link is single-use and expires in 7 days. Send it to your partner.
settings.waiting: Waiting for your partner — create an invite and send it over.
settings.leaveConfirm: Leave household mode? You stop seeing combined totals (your own data is unaffected).

join.title: Invite — Household mode
join.body: You were invited to share a combined view of finances. Each of you sees only the other’s totals — never the transactions.
join.invalid: The invite is invalid or expired. Ask your partner for a new link.

loadError: Could not load the household view.
notMember: You are not part of a household yet. Enable household mode in Settings → Account.
